user_prompt: Show me the options visually so I can choose quickly.
expected_behavior: uses ubershow only if a visual artifact materially improves decision speed
creates or adapts a self-contained HTML decision surface
includes a copyable decision receipt and tells the user to paste it back for registration
states that HTML is a generated view and Markdown/session log remains source authority
does not create an HTML artifact for a simple factual answer
answers concisely in text or a small code block
